titleStmt.title: SII 18.154: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 154. (B.K. No. 3 of 1932-33.) AGAḌI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This undated inscription referring itself to the reign of Jagadēkamalladēva, records the erection of a Śivālaya by the wife of Amitarāsi of Kōḍiyabīḍu and registers a gift of land by Māreya-Nāyaka, son of Amitarāsijīya to the temple of Bāchēśvaradēva (apparently the Śivālaya mentioned above) in the regime of Mahāprabhu Bācha-gāvuṇḍa when Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Tailapadēva was governing Banavāse Twelve-thousand. It also registers a gift of land made to the mason Dēvaja who constructed the sukanāsi of the temple while Jekki-seṭṭi, son of Chīli-seṭṭi, was enjoying the seṭṭitana of Kōḍiyabīḍu. The record contains numerous scribal errors.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgasiraccuṁbicaṁdracāmaracaravē traiḷōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlattaṁbhaya śaṁbhavē © śrīmatu kōḍiyabī
ḍinayamitarasiya kulavadhu paratreyavagi sivaleyane
ttisidaḷu .
© svasti samattabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahāraja
dhiraja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭarakaṁ satyaśrayakuḷatiḷaka
cāḷukyabharaṇa śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvevijayarajyamuttarōtta
rābhivridhdhipravarddhamanamaca(ṁ)ndrarkkatāraṁbhara saluttamire . tatupadapadumō
pajīvi . svasti samastaprasostisahita śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara tailapa
dēvaru banavāse pannicchāsiramumaṁ Ubheyasāmyamaṁ sukasaṁkatāvinōda
di rājyaṁgeyye tatupādapadumōpajīvi . svasti samastadustararipu
madēbhakuṁbhasthaḷadaḷavidaḷananakhāgrakaṇṭhīrava raṇaraṁgabhaira
va sa cārucaritra nayavineyasīlasaṇpanna vidyōpāsa
naṁ ka ḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ nuḍidaṁnte gaṇḍa saraṇāgatavajra
paṁjara kuṁjara gōtrapavitra gaḍiyaṁkamalla ripuhrideya
sellaṁ ndhavaraṇa jayalakṣmīgrihatōraṇa haracaraṇakama
ḷabhṛṁga vikramōtuṁga nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīma
nmahāprabhu bācagāvuṇḍa sthirajīvi . svastiyamaniyamasvādhyā
yadhyānadhāraṇamōnanuṣṭaṇajapasamadhisīḷasaṁpannarappa
Āmitarāsijīyara putra māreyanāyaka bacēsvaradēvaraṁga
bhōgakke svasti śrīmanmahaprabhuvegaḍe suṁkigeṟeya sukasaṁkatāvi
nōdadiṁdāḷutta bammagāvuṇḍanuṁ bīcayvevuṁ pratipāḷisuva
dharmmamentaṁdaḍe kuṁdeyageṟeya mōṣavariya gadde ka 15
kōḍiyabīḍina hāḷiṁ teṁkaṇameyyalu kisumatta
leraḍu kamma 50 samastaguṇasaṁpanna nuḍidu mattenna pa
ranārīputraṁ gōtrapavitra kūṭakkoḷgaṇḍa mārkko
ḷvara gaṇḍa kaliyugabhīma caladaṁkarāma piridittu
maṟava sauryyamaṁ meṟeva māhēsvaragaṇavatā
ra cīliseṭṭiya maga bakāla jekkiseṭi kōḍiyabīḍa
kalāvadagoṇḍa seṭitanaṁ geyuttamiṟdu bācēsvaradēva
ra sukanāsiya Iṭigevesanageysi A dēgulakkemē
lgelasavaṁ paḍisalisuva binnaṇi kalkuṭiga dēvajaṁge
biṭṭakeyi mataro(ṁ)ndu . Intī dhammamaṁ pratipaḷi
sidavargge varaṇasi gurukṣētradali sāsira kavi
leyaṁ sāsira brarmmaṇargge koṭṭa phalamaku Idanaḷi
davaṁ sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsira brāmmaṇarumaṁ
konda paṁcamahāpātakanaku © .
© Alliya Āṟuvattokaluṁ keṁcagētaṇanuṁvidu dharmma
manāraivaru © .
Digital edition of SII 18.154 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
